description_long: This is a modern, spacious bungalow set within a walled property, featuring a flat roof and large glass windows. The main building is complemented by a detached garage and a landscaped yard with palm trees and shrubbery. A prominent feature is the dual tennis courts located on one side of the property, surrounded by a paved area and greenery. The front facade showcases a balcony and a covered entryway, while the rear includes a patio and additional outdoor seating areas. The property is enclosed by a low fence, providing both security and an open view of the surroundings. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a detached garage, landscaped yard, and dual tennis courts within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, garage, and landscaped yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis courts, garage, and the flat roof structure of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, outdoor seating, and tennis courts, with the main building's glass windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tennis courts, rear landscaping, and the bungalow's modern lines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and balcony doors
